name: Xu Zhao [Shao]
page_title: Xu Zhao [Shao] 許昭[韶] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives

sections.short-biography: Son of Xu Chang. Killed by Sun Jian along with his father.
sections.details:
Traditional Chinese 
	許昭[韶]


	 Simplified Chinese 
	许昭[韶]


	 Wade-Giles 
	Hsü Chao [Shao]

	 Birthplace 
	Kuaiji

	 Other Names 
	Xu Hao, Xu Shao

	 Name Notes 
	Xu Hao in the online novel version. Xu Zhao’s name is a bit of a mystery. Xu Chang (probably Xu Zhao’s) staged a rebellion in Kuaiji (or Xu Zhao did) and Xu Zhao was either leader (HHS 102), sole son by the name of Xu Shao, associated leader by the name of Xu Shao (SGZ Wu 1), or two sons named Zhao and Shao. In any case, Xu Zhao 昭 seems most likely as Shao 韶 may have been used in Sanguozhi to avoid a taboo on Sima Zhao’s name.

full_text:
Xu Zhao [Shao] 許昭[韶]
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Zhao [Shao] (許昭[韶])was born in Kuaiji. Son of Xu Chang. Killed by Sun Jian along with his father. Xu Zhao [Shao] lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
Return to theThree Kingdoms Encyclopediaor browse theEncyclopedia Directory.
